plannedFamilies.name: elegy-memory-v1
plannedFamilies.scope: Local non-authoritative import, list, show, export, supersede, and tombstone semantics only.

entries.notes: Publishes bundle 1.2.0 as an additive update on the existing 1.x line: agent-response-envelope remains backward compatible, the dedicated summary-only-session-context-envelope durable artifact remains unchanged, and Elegy-memory V1 adds bounded local non-authoritative import, list, show, export, supersede, and tombstone semantics while SAASTools retains currentness, approval, freshness policy, retrieval ranking, runtime validation, and promotion authority.
